actions.text: Referred to the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform.

official_title: Condemning President Donald J. Trump for his disgraceful, despicable, and disrespectful social media post depicting himself as Jesus Christ, diminishing the dignity of the Presidency and bringing disrepute to the office.
